title: scrophularia orientalis
intro: Scrophularia orientalis, also known as the Oriental figwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The plant's health benefits also include its ability to act as an antiviral, antibacterial, and antifungal agent, making it a potential treatment for various infections. Herbal preparations of Scrophularia orientalis are typically made by infusing the dried roots and leaves in hot water, and can also be found in capsule or tincture form, although the latter should be used under the guidance of a medical professional.
